dialogues.text: I'm short $5 for the kids' school supplies. Could you help?
dialogues.yes_response: Thank you so much. You don't know how much this helps.
dialogues.no_response: They'll make do. Kids are resilient.

dialogues.text: Could you watch my stroller for a minute while I run into the store? $4.
dialogues.yes_response: She's sleeping so just stay close. Thank you.
dialogues.no_response: I'll bring it in with me. It'll be fine.

dialogues.text: I'm $7 short for this week's grocery run.
dialogues.yes_response: I'll pay you back when my check clears. I mean it.
dialogues.no_response: I'll buy less this week. It's fine.

dialogues.text: Help me carry this stroller up the steps? My husband's at work. $5.
dialogues.yes_response: If you take the front I'll take the back. Thank you.

dialogues.text: I forgot my transit card. $3 for the bus fare?
dialogues.yes_response: Thank you. We'd have been stuck here for hours.
dialogues.no_response: Maybe someone at the stop will help. Thank you anyway.

dialogues.text: Could you return this item at the customer service desk? I can't leave the stroller. $6.
dialogues.yes_response: Receipt's in the bag. They might ask for an exchange.
dialogues.no_response: I'll come back without the stroller another time.

dialogues.text: I'm $8 short for the electricity bill due today.
dialogues.yes_response: I'll pay you back this Friday without fail.
dialogues.no_response: I'll call and ask for an extension.

dialogues.text: Help me assemble this toy before my son's nap ends? $7.
dialogues.yes_response: The instructions are impossible but two minds help. Come.
dialogues.no_response: I'll do half tonight and half tomorrow.

dialogues.text: I lost $4 from my wallet somewhere in here. Help me search?
dialogues.yes_response: I last had it near that bench. Thank you.

dialogues.text: Could you spare $6 for diapers? I miscounted and I'm out.
dialogues.yes_response: You're a lifesaver. Literally for a baby.
dialogues.no_response: I'll call my sister. She's nearby.
